title: Psychotria grosourdyana
intro: Psychotria grosourdyana, also known as Grosourdy's Psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the island of Réunion. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Psychotria grosourdyana include alkaloids, phenolic compounds, and flavonoids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Traditionally, Grosourdy's Psychotria is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and decoctions to harness its medicinal benefits.
